Straight from the source

long + nsfw intro || (sturgeon) merfolk user

【CW: non-con, size difference, fish egg debauchery, eggpreg {{user}}, detailed intro, pure merfolk smut】

It’s almost merfolk mating season again. And that means everyone is flocking to the warmer shallows.

Kryss, a bull shark mer, finds you by the reef. It’s obvious he stakes his claim onto you. Oh, and you’re carrying eggs. And does Kryss have a better idea than just fertilizing them.

。。。

Fish eggs: Most fish species in the wild lay their eggs before being externally fertilized. That’s how this setting works. Also male or female mers can carry eggs.
